name_cn:
Genuine quality, replica version MiuMiu
5BC125 Black Silver Blue White Big Red Begonia Pink Snow Pink Light Pink
The Wander handbag is a classic Miu series accessory. This mini handbag is made of Matelassé soft calfskin, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship and a three-dimensional effect. Featuring a crescent bag shape, blending vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of modern women's temperament. Size: 20*17*6cm
